title: Crepinella pallens
taxonomy: Crepinella pallens is classified as a species of fungus within the genus Crepinella, which belongs to the family Hymenochaetaceae. This genus consists of species that are primarily saprotrophic, obtaining nutrients by breaking down dead organic matter. The Hymenochaetaceae family is a group of fungi that are commonly found in decaying wood and other plant materials.
